ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the production step */,
  "time_required" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the step */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty for the step */,
  "skill_level_required" TEXT /* Level of skill required to complete the step */,
  "procedure_document" TEXT /* Detailed procedure document for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the tool's use */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  "calibration_required" INTEGER /* Whether the tool requires calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "step_tools" (
  "step_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the step-tool association */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production step */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used in the production step */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tool required for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_tools_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_tools_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES production_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material's use */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "step_materials" (
  "step_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the step-material association */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production step */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the production step */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_materials_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES production_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the worker (e.g., operator, supervisor) */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of skill of the worker */,
  "training_status" INTEGER /* Whether the worker has completed required training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "batch_description" TEXT /* Description of the batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the batch is being produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker assignment */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned to the batch */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the worker was assigned to the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_assignments_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "production_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "production_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production batch related to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who received training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was conducted */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment's use */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "step_equipment" (
  "step_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the step-equipment association */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production step */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the production step */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment required for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_equipment_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES production_steps ("step_id")
)
